summary: Kenneth discusses dividend-paying ETFs and their historical performance over a year, comparing price appreciation and dividend growth across VIIG, DGRO, DGRW, and SCHD. While dividend investing is mentioned, this is general stock market education unrelated to options trading, covered calls, cash-secured puts, or the Premium Desk strategy.
takeaways: Dividend-paying ETFs showed 6-14% price appreciation over one year
Dividends also grew 7-133% during the same period
Diversification is emphasized as the most important principle
title: Dividends are fantastic
